app.title: Mounjaro PK Simulator
app.subtitle: Estimate in-body Tirzepatide residual amount and concentration changes using a pharmacokinetic model

simulation.thresholdTitle: Enter the estimated peak value when you last felt discomfort.
simulation.infoText: Half-life approx. 5 days (120 hours). Time to peak concentration (Tmax) approx. 2 days (48 hours). Uses a one-compartment linear absorption and elimination model.

diet.title: Diet Advice
diet.subtitle: Dietary considerations while using Tirzepatide
diet.alcoholText: You should strictly avoid alcohol while using Tirzepatide. Alcohol can worsen the drug's gastrointestinal side effects (nausea, vomiting) and may increase the risk of hypoglycemia. Even so-called "non-alcoholic" beers may still contain trace amounts of alcohol (typically below 0.5%).
diet.nafBeerText: If you choose to drink non-alcoholic beer, make sure to select products that have been "filtered." Unfiltered non-alcoholic beers may contain residual yeast and higher trace alcohol levels, making them unsuitable during treatment. Check the label for the word "Filtered" when purchasing.
mealItems: Eat small, frequent meals: Split daily food into 5-6 small portions to avoid large meals
Chew slowly: Chew each bite 20-30 times to aid digestion and reduce nausea
Avoid high-fat foods: Reduce fried and high-fat foods to lower GI discomfort
Stay hydrated: Drink 1.5-2 liters of water daily, in small frequent sips
Quality protein: Ensure adequate protein intake (chicken breast, fish, tofu, etc.) to prevent muscle loss
High-fiber produce: Increase vegetable and fruit intake to maintain GI function
supplementItems: Multivitamin: Since food intake decreases, consider daily multivitamin supplementation
Vitamin B12: Long-term GLP-1 agonist use may affect B12 absorption
Calcium & Vitamin D: Maintain bone health, especially during rapid weight loss
Electrolytes: If experiencing vomiting or diarrhea, monitor electrolyte levels
diet.timingText: Side effects are most noticeable 24-48 hours after injection. Keep meals lighter during this period. As your body adjusts to the medication, you can gradually return to normal eating patterns.

exercise.title: Exercise Log
exercise.subtitle: Track your exercise during treatment
adviceItems: Start gradually: Begin with low intensity and progressively increase as fitness allows
Prioritize strength training: At least 2-3 sessions per week to minimize muscle loss during weight reduction
Rest after injection: Avoid vigorous exercise on injection day and the day after, especially if experiencing nausea
Stay hydrated: Drink water before, during, and after exercise to prevent dehydration worsening side effects
Monitor blood sugar: If diabetic, check blood glucose before and after exercise
Listen to your body: Stop immediately if you experience dizziness, severe nausea, or discomfort
exercise.noRecords: No exercise records yet. Click the button above to add one.

dataManagement.title: Data Management
dataManagement.subtitle: Export backups or import previous records
dataManagement.exportJsonDesc: Export all dose records, exercise records, and settings as a JSON file
dataManagement.importJsonDesc: Restore data from a previously exported JSON file
dataManagement.exportPdfDesc: Generate a comprehensive PDF report with charts and records
dataManagement.importConfirm: Importing will overwrite all current data. Are you sure you want to continue?
dataManagement.pdfDisclaimer: This report is for reference only and should not replace professional medical advice.

footer.disclaimerText: This tool is for academic simulation and reference purposes only. Calculations are based on a simplified one-compartment pharmacokinetic model with average parameters and cannot represent individual physiological conditions. For any dosage adjustments or medication decisions, please consult a qualified weight management physician or healthcare professional. Do not use these results as a substitute for professional medical advice.
footer.privacyText: This open-source tool does not upload your data to any medical server. All records are stored only in your browser.
